title: Quest 35240 Electric Single Hob/Hot Plate with Temperature Control / 1500W Hob / 5 Temperature Settings/Portable, Ideal for Camping, Caravans & Travelling
features: ELECTRIC HOT PLATES - This single electric hob from Quest is ideal for cooking both at home and while traveling! Easily cook foods on the hob while camping, in a caravan, or in other places while out and about. Simply plug it in and the hob are ready to go.

THERMOSTATICALLY CONTROLLED – The single hob provides plenty of cooking power, measuring at 1500W, and also has 5 temperature settings operated by a simple dial. This allows you to easily cook any food you want, with simple, precise control!

DURABLE AND EASY TO CLEAN - The hob has a non-stick coating as well as overheat protection to allow you to clean up any spilled food easily. There are also non-slip feet on the base of the hob, to prevent any accidents either whilst cooking or cleaning.

QUALITY MATERIALS – The single hob consists of a solid die-cast heating plate, which provides an even temperature distribution, resulting in a better outcome for your cooking. It's easy to make a good meal even if you don't have great cooking skills!

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking & cleaning appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the home. From teppanyaki grills & waffle makers, to kettles, irons, & steam cleaners, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description Previous page Portable Hob Cook food while on the go, in a caravan, campsite, or more, thanks to these hobs' portable design. Adjustable Temperature Choose between a total of 5 different temperature settings, allowing you to cook different foods. Dial-Based Controls Adjusting the settings is easy, with precise dial controls that are clearly labelled. Stable Design The non-slip feet on the base of the hobs ensures they will remain stable on any surface. Non-Stick Coating The hot plates, as well as the rest of the hobs, feature a non-stick coating to make cleaning easy.
